content: The incomplete, fragmented search traces that define the given topics can be reframed as the uncurated "working memory" of an active 2024-2025 SOTA curiosity-driven learning agent, where partial, low-confidence information seeds drive further information querying instead of being discarded as noise. This turns the unprocessed topic data itself into a case study of how active learning agent memory handles incomplete knowledge, rather than just a topic of research about such memory systems.
